title: thamnosma texana
intro: Thamnosma texana, also known as Texas rue or Texas sage, is a small shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Thamnosma texana include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments for various health applications.
